prTitle: feat: build MeasurementLogView form and assemble ProgressView
prBody:
## Summary

- Implements `ProgressViewModel` — `@Observable @MainActor` class managing body metric CRUD, chart data aggregation, and per-type filtering backed by `ProgressRepository`
- Implements `MeasurementLogView` — modal `Form` sheet with `BodyMetricType` picker, dynamic decimal value field with unit label, and past-constrained `DatePicker`; calls an `onSave` closure on confirmation
- Implements `ProgressView` — main Progress screen with metric-type chip picker, Swift Charts `LineMark`/`AreaMark` line chart, latest-value summary tile, swipe-to-delete measurement history list, and full loading/error/empty-state handling
- Adds `BodyMetricType.CaseIterable` conformance and `displayName` helper used by both the form and the chip picker
- Adds 30 unit tests in `ProgressViewModelTests.swift` covering all VM actions, computed properties, and error paths
- Updates `docs/swiftdata-models.md` with ProgressViewModel, its views, computed properties, and test coverage documentation

Closes #65
